description: The WorldOrb component is a Grabbable component that allows users to grab and throw it to open a world.

fields.SessionStartingUser: The user that started the session if this is a session orb.
fields.URL: The session or world this goes to.
fields.ActiveSessionURLs: A list of currently active sessions for the worldmm.
fields.CreateIfNotExists: A sync delegate to call when a session does not exist for the world for this world orb. Passes this component as an argument.
fields.OpenActionOverride: The Sync delegate to call as an override for this world orb's open Action. Passes this component as an argument.
fields.Visit: Whether the local user has visted the target world.
fields.ActiveUsers: How many active users are in the target world.
fields.RecordStateUpdated: Whether the world orb has up to date info after spawn.
fields.CanModify: Whether the world can be modified and saved.
fields.LongPressIndicatorColor: The color to use when the world orb is long pressed.
fields.LongPressTime: How long the user has to click to trigger a long press.
fields._longPressIndicator: The mesh that fills a ring indicator when doing a long press.
fields._longPressIndicatorMaterial: The material used to indicate a long press.
fields.Touched: The Sync delegate to trigger when this world orb is touched. Sends this component and the touch info as arguments to the Sync Delegate.
fields.LongPressTriggered: The Sync delegate to trigger when long pressing. Passes this component as an argument to the Sync delegate.
fields._lastFetchedUrl: The last URL fetched for this world.
fields._isReadOnly: The target world is a read only world, no saving.
fields._orbRoot: The slot storing the world orb visual.
fields._infoRoot: The slot storing the text visual for information about the world.
fields._thumbTex: The texture being used to store the picture of the 360 session preview
fields._thumbMaterial: The material making the inner world preview/session 360 picture.
fields._shellMaterial: The material making a rim lighting around the world orb.
fields._nameText: The text renderer showing the name of the world.
fields._creatorText: The text renderer showing the name of the creator of the world.
fields._visitsText: The text renderer showing the current world visits number.
fields._usersText: The text renderer showing the current users number.
fields._namePosition: The field to drive with the position of the world name text.
fields._creatorPosition: The field to drive with the position of the creator name text.
fields._visitsPosition: The field to drive with the position of the visits amount.
fields._usersPosition: The field to drive with the position of the user count text.
fields._userCountText: The field to drive with the world orb's world user count.
fields._sizeDrive: The field to drive with the world orb's scale.
fields._iconSlot: The root slot of the icon visual.
fields._iconTexture: The icon texture for this world orb's icon.
fields._iconMaterial: The Unlit Material for showing the icon.
fields._iconPosition: The field to drive with the position of the world icon.
fields._sessionStartDialog: The current dialogue for starting a new session
fields._lastTouch: The last time in world time that a user touched the orb.
fields._lastFlash: The last time in world time that a user double clicked the orb.

methods.CustomWorldStart: Handles when the user asks to open a custom world.
methods.OnStartNewSession: Handles when the user starts a new session with default settings.
methods.OnStartCustomSession: Handles when the user asks to open a custom session.
methods.OnJoinSession: Handles when a user joins the target session.
methods.OnEditMetadata: Handles when a user asks to edit the metadata.
methods.OnCancelMenu: Handles when the user cancels an action in a menu.
methods.OnCloneWorld: Handles when the user asks to make a clone of the world.
methods.OnDeleteWorld: Handles when the user asks to delete a world.
methods.OnReallyDeleteWorld: Handles when the user asks to truely delete a world.
methods.OnOverwrite: Handles when the user does a save overwrite.
